steps.title: Model the drawn line, not a nearby dot
steps.content: The question asks for the value predicted by the line of best fit at $x=2$. Use the drawn line, not an individual scatterplot point. Two readable points on the line are about $(0,16)$ and $(20,4)$.

steps.title: Use the regression row
steps.content: In Desmos, the row $y_1\sim m x_1+b$ gives $m=-0.6$ and $b=16$, so a good model for the drawn line is $y=-0.6x+16$.

steps.title: Evaluate at x = 2
steps.content: At $x=2$, the fitted line gives $y=-0.6(2)+16=14.8$. The closest answer choice is $15$, so choice D is correct.
